supply_chain_findings.detail: Scoped package "@iconify/react" wraps popular name "react" - verify publisher
glob@10.3.3 has known vulnerability GHSA-5j98-mcp5-4vw2 — glob CLI: Command injection via -c/--cmd executes matches with shell:true (fix: >=11.1.0)
webpack@5.74.0 has known vulnerability GHSA-38r7-794h-5758 — webpack buildHttp HttpUriPlugin allowedUris bypass via HTTP redirects → SSRF + cache persistence (fix: >=5.104.0)

webpack@5.74.0 has known vulnerability GHSA-8fgc-7cc6-rx7x — webpack buildHttp: allowedUris allow-list bypass via URL userinfo (@) leading to build-time SSRF behavior (fix: >=5.104.1)
webpack@5.74.0 has known vulnerability GHSA-hc6q-2mpp-qw7j — Cross-realm object access in Webpack 5 (fix: >=5.76.0)
